Recent updates in New York City include a tragic shooting of a teenager near a Bronx day care, a massive fire affecting 11 stores on E. Gun Hill Road, and significant disruptions to subway service during rush hour, alongside rising energy costs and new regulations impacting delivery workers and housing policies.

### Risks & Alerts

- Teen shot and killed near Bronx day care; police are searching for three suspects. - Deep flooding on Rockaway Boulevard in Queens causing significant issues for drivers; proceed with caution. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Subway service disrupted on many lines during evening rush hour; expect delays. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Prepare for higher energy bills and potential rolling blackouts in New York.
